de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface TermTransformer

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractTermTransformer, AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, EnumConstantValue, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, IntroAtPreDefsOp, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaBinaryAnd, MetaBinaryOr, MetaBinaryXOr, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaShiftLeft, MetaShiftRight, MetaSub

    public interface TermTransformer
extends SortedOperator
    TermTransformer perform complex term transformation which cannot be (efficiently or at all) described by taclets.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Term transform(Term term, SVInstantiations svInst, Services services)
      initiates term transformation of term.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.SortedOperator

        argSort, argSorts, sort

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Operator

        arity, bindVarsAt, isRigid, sort, validTopLevel

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name

    • Method Detail

      • transform

        Term transform(Term term,
               SVInstantiations svInst,
               Services services)
        initiates term transformation of term. Note the top level operator of of parameter term has to be this term transformer.
